name: node-del
title: node-del
description:
Delete files and folders
This module is similar to rimraf, but with a Promise API and support for
multiple files and globbing. It also protects you against deleting the current
working directory and above.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-del because Delete files and folders.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-del as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-del with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-del --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
